title: DIE IN YOUR ARMS
full_title: DIE IN YOUR ARMS by LEX (JPN)
lyrics:
[Chorus]
I was sleeping in your arms
君 help me in my dark so
I want 2 die in your arms
In your arms in your arms
What is love what is the 愛
君 tell me in my dream so
I want 2 die in your arms
In your arms in your arms
I was sleeping in your arms
君 help me in my dark so
I want 2 die in your arms
In your arms in your arms
What is love what is the 愛
君 tell me in my dream so
I want 2 die in your arms
In your arms in your arms

[Verse]
境界線 you&me
I don't know what it is so
Just look at my eyes
I don't wanna new friends
You stole my 未来 hey
You cannot understand me
I hope never again
I hope never again
Never会うことのない未来 that's all i want
あのphotoすら消えてく手の影も
もし別の場所で会えたら良いかも
俺しか知らないmemoryで見守る
Baby go away right now
I repeat go away right now
Don't come back again
But baby don't go away

[Chorus]
I was sleeping in your arms
君 help me in my dark so
